mean, I have like a template that I paste in.

yeah.

a ticket.

yeah, yeah, and look, the way I look at that, personally, is like, okay, if you can reduce it from every time to one in ten, you know, that's a material, know, and then.
it's a gentick, if it's a gentick, then I might be able to do that now, because it'll just iterate, it'll check itself, be like, oh, does it pass that check of.

It just basically says...

think that's a good instinct to, like, get the stuff on the books or into the pipeline that you know will most likely be successful.

I have not received anything like that.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Check-in on Nathan's capacity and strategize on workflow efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Capacity is good:** Gentic pipelines cut pre-processing from 45 mins to 5–10, freeing up time for a new programmatic page rollout.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [**Meta-tagging is the top bottleneck:** Nathan's manual Claude process is inefficient; the solution is to file a ticket for an agentic pipeline workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [**File tickets for process automation:** With new engineering capacity, Nathan should file tickets to automate manual processes, starting with meta-tagging.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**DataGrid team changes are unrelated:** Recent departures (Mara, Vivek, Nika) are individual career moves, not a sign of client issues.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)

## Topics

### Capacity & Workflow Efficiency

  - [Gentic pipelines cut pre-processing time from \~45 mins to 5–10 mins, resolving a capacity crunch.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [This efficiency gain came just before the rollout of programmatic pages.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Post-processing time remains 30–45 mins/post, creating the next bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

### Bottleneck 1: Meta-Tagging

  - [The pipeline's deterministic meta-tagging is low quality, forcing a manual workaround in Claude.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [**Current Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
      - [Feed article to a Claude project.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
      - [Use a template prompt for 5 options each for slug, meta title, meta description, and article title.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
      - [Copy-paste into a visual tool (e.g., Fangools) to check display in Google search results.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [**Solution:** File an engineering ticket for an agentic workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
      - [**Rationale:** An agent can iterate and self-correct against a rubric (e.g., character counts), unlike the current deterministic process.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [**Ticket Details:**](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
          - [Include the Claude prompt and examples of desired outputs.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
          - [Request multiple options for selection.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
          - [Suggest a visual preview feature (P2 priority).](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)

### Bottleneck 2: Manual Post-Processing

  - [Nathan uses a "bulk prompt" in Atlas to proofread articles for style (e.g., em dashes).](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Solution:** Automate this process by filing a ticket.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Automate the most reliable steps first to get quick wins.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Compartmentalize the prompt into separate steps to isolate errors and make troubleshooting easier.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)

### DataGrid Team Stability

  - [Nathan asked about recent departures (Mara, Vivek, Nika) from the DataGrid team.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [Matthew confirmed the departures are unrelated individual career moves, not a sign of client issues.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [DataGrid is an important client, and Matthew has not received any negative feedback from the account's Engagement Manager.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nathan:** File an engineering ticket for an agentic meta-tagging workflow, including the Claude prompt and examples.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [**Nathan:** File a ticket to automate the "bulk prompt" post-processing workflow, separating it into distinct steps.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Nathan:** Proactively file tickets for any other manual processes that can be automated.](https://fathom.video/share/MDxzMNet8sz8SoxJxFJhLh42BFyWLoSh?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)

action_items.description: File ticket re: meta tagging: Claude prompt, examples, agentic, 3–5 options, pre-publish, pass to publisher, in-situ preview; P1 core, P2 preview
Audit post-processing prompts; file ticket re: agentic steps w/ rubrics; keep high-difficulty manual
